```{r}
create_maps <- function(data, target_feature_value, suffix) {
  # First map
  map1 <- data %>%
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = as.factor(!!sym(paste0(target_feature_value, suffix))))) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "viridis", name = "Value") +
    theme_void() +
    coord_sf(xlim = c(-88.4, -87.52398), ylim = c(41.5, 42.2))
  
  # Second map
  map2 <- data %>%
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = !!sym(paste0("percentage", suffix)))) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = "Value") +
    theme_void() +
    coord_sf(xlim = c(-88.4, -87.52398), ylim = c(41.5, 42.2))
  
  return(list(map1 = map1, map2 = map2))
}
```





```{r}
maps <- create_maps(pin_nbhd, "your_target_feature_value", "_1")

```

```{r}

pin_nbhd %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = percentage_1)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = "Value") +
  theme_void() +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-88.4, -87.52398), ylim = c(41.5, 42.2))
```
